_comment: CATALOGUE manifest (per-app record). The file actually polled by case-service is official/sources.json; _poll_source() reads it and ingests packages into marketplace_packages. Keep this entry in sync with official/sources.json. Tier is NOT trusted from here — it is re-derived by _effective_tier: official requires source org velaris-app-os AND under official/ AND id in official_registry.json.
name: HxCheckout
description: Commerce integration layer: connect any existing website to Velaris. External baskets POST to a public endpoint and become Order cases that Velaris owns end-to-end (payment via Stripe/HxConnect, fulfilment, delivery tracking, returns, complaints). Server-to-server API + HMAC webhook mode (Shopify/WooCommerce/Magento/BigCommerce). Installing it turns on /api/v1/checkout and the Studio HxCheckout module for the tenant.

versions.release_notes: Initial release. Order intake API + HMAC webhook mode + Order case type + returns/complaints.
